Title: Outlook inbox syncing issue
Notes:
Issue:
Inbox was not receiving emails.

Steps Taken:

  1. Initial Testing:

    • Sent test emails to the inbox. Emails were sent but not received.

  2. Office 365 Update:

    • Diagnosed that Office 365 was outdated.

    • Updated the Outlook application.

    • Issue persisted after the update.

  3. .OST File & OneDrive Conflict:

    • Discovered that the Outlook .ost file was added to OneDrive, causing sync conflicts and preventing other OneDrive files from syncing.

    • Removed the .ost file from OneDrive and disconnected it.

    • OneDrive sync restored successfully.

  4. Outlook Profile Reset:

    • Inbox still not receiving emails.

    • Removed all Outlook profiles and reconfigured the account.

    • Emails are now syncing correctly and appearing gradually in the inbox.

Status:

  • Issue resolved; Outlook is now syncing emails properly.

  • OneDrive fully functional.
Resource:
S. Kumar Sharma
CHD-TS1
Support - Remote

Title: Outlook inbox syncing issue
Notes: I accessed the system and diagnosed that it was showing as syncing, but the data file size had not changed at all over 15 minutes. To improve synchronization, I downloaded and installed GWSMO and reconfigured Outlook. Mail syncing has now resumed successfully, and meanwhile, the user can send and receive emails instantly. I monitored the progress for an additional 30 minutes, and once everything appeared to be working fine, I tested with Mike as well. I also advised Mike to regularly monitor the sync status because the mailbox size is 76 GB, which is quite large and may take some time to fully sync.
Resource:
S. Kumar Sharma
CHD-TS1
Support - Remote

Title: Outlook inbox syncing issue
Notes:
I reviewed all the settings that were applied yesterday and identified that synchronization had stopped after reaching the maximum size limit. I increased the Outlook data file size to 100 GB via the registry.

Synchronization has now resumed successfully, and new emails are being received. The Inbox and Sent Items folders are also fully synchronized.
